case_title: I DAY CO., INC vs. JONES, ETTA

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF I DAY CO., INC AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ETTA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-22-1992

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF I DAY CO., INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, ETTA $112.48 PRINCIPAL, $28.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $19.66 INTEREST, $92.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $252.74
